info.name: FundTrack Microservices API
info.description:
Complete REST API collection for the FundTrack grant management microservices platform.

**Entry point:** All requests go through the API Gateway at `{{base_url}}` (default: http://localhost:8081).

**Authentication:**
- Public routes: `/api/v1/auth/**` — no token required.
- All other routes require `Authorization: Bearer {{token}}`.
- Analytics endpoints additionally require `ADMIN` role.

**Quick Start:**
1. Run `Login` — the post-response script auto-sets `{{token}}` and `{{refresh_token}}`.
2. Use the populated `{{token}}` for all subsequent requests.
3. Override ID variables (`{{program_id}}`, `{{application_id}}`, etc.) in the collection or environment as needed.

**Gateway Header Injection:**
The API Gateway extracts `X-User-Id`, `X-User-Email`, and `X-User-Roles` from the JWT and injects them as headers before forwarding to downstream services. Clients should NOT set these headers manually.

variable.description: JWT access token — auto-set by the Login request script
Refresh token — auto-set by the Login request script
Encrypted payment ID returned by the Process Payment response

item.name: 01 - Identity Service (Auth)
item.description: Authentication and user management. All routes in this folder are PUBLIC — no token required.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "John Doe",
  "email": "john.doe@cts.com",
  "password": "P@ssw0rd1",
  "role": "APPLICANT",
  "phoneNumber": "9876543210"
}

request.description: Register a new user account. Role must be one of: ADMIN, FINANCE_OFFICER, APPLICANT, APPROVER, REVIEWER, COMPLIANCE_OFFICER. Password: 6-12 chars, must contain uppercase, lowercase, and a digit. Phone: exactly 10 digits.

Authenticate a user and obtain JWT access and refresh tokens. The post-response script automatically saves the tokens to `{{token}}` and `{{refresh_token}}` collection variables. Access token TTL: 15 minutes. Refresh token TTL: 7 days.
Invalidate the current user session. Adds the active token to the revocation blacklist.
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new JWT access token. The post-response script saves the new access token to `{{token}}`.
Initiate a password recovery flow. Sends a secure reset token to the registered email address. Response is intentionally generic to prevent user enumeration.
Complete the password reset using the token received by email. Password: 6-12 characters, must contain uppercase, lowercase, and a digit.

item.name: 02 - Program Service
item.description: Grant program lifecycle management. Requires ADMIN or FINANCE_OFFICER role for write operations. All requests require a Bearer token.

request.description: Create a new funding program with eligibility rules and required document definitions. Roles: ADMIN, FINANCE_OFFICER.
Retrieve a list of all active funding programs.
Retrieve a single program by its UUID. Update `{{program_id}}` in collection variables.

query.description: Search term matched against program name and description

request.description: Full-text search for programs using a keyword. Matched against program name and description fields.
Full update of an existing program by ID. Replaces all fields. Roles: ADMIN, FINANCE_OFFICER.
Archive (soft-delete) a program by ID. Marks the program as inactive without deleting it. Roles: ADMIN.

query.description: Target program status (e.g., ACTIVE, CLOSED, ARCHIVED, DRAFT)

request.description: Transition a program to a new lifecycle status. Valid values depend on the ProgramStatus enum (e.g., DRAFT, ACTIVE, CLOSED, ARCHIVED).
Permanently delete a program by ID. Roles: ADMIN.
Retrieve all eligibility rules (SpEL expressions) configured for a specific program.
Retrieve the document requirements and eligibility criteria for a specific program.

item.name: 03 - Applications
item.description: Grant application submission and lifecycle management. Roles: APPLICANT for submit/view own; ADMIN for all.

request.description: Submit a new grant application. The applicant's identity is derived from the JWT (`X-User-Id` is injected by the gateway — clients do not set it). The `applicationData` field is evaluated against the program's SpEL eligibility rules. Role: APPLICANT.
Update an existing application before it progresses past the SUBMITTED state. Role: APPLICANT (own applications only).
Retrieve full applicant details and application summary for a given application ID.
Retrieve all documents attached to a specific application.
Retrieve the SpEL eligibility rule evaluation results for a specific application.
Permanently delete a draft or rejected application. Role: APPLICANT (own) or ADMIN.
Retrieve all applications submitted by the currently authenticated user. The user ID is derived from the JWT (gateway-injected `X-User-Id`). Role: APPLICANT.
Check whether a program has any applications with a SUBMITTED (pending review) status. Returns a boolean.
Retrieve a list of application UUIDs that have been APPROVED for a given program. Used by the disbursement engine.

item.name: 04 - Reviews
item.description: Reviewer workflow for evaluating submitted applications. Role: REVIEWER.

request.description: Retrieve all applications in SUBMITTED status awaiting reviewer evaluation.
Submit a review evaluation for a SUBMITTED application. Score range: 0–100. Recommendation verdict: RECOMMENDED or NOT_RECOMMENDED. Transitions the application to UNDER_REVIEW status.
Partially update an existing review evaluation for an application. Role: REVIEWER.
Remove a review record for a specific application. Role: REVIEWER or ADMIN.
Retrieve the dashboard data for a specific reviewer, including all their review evaluations and aggregated statistics.

item.name: 05 - Decisions
item.description: Approver workflow for rendering final approval or rejection decisions on reviewed applications. Role: APPROVER.

request.description: Retrieve all applications currently in UNDER_REVIEW status that are awaiting a final approval decision.
Retrieve full decision details for a specific application, including reviewer scores and recommendation.

Render a final verdict on an UNDER_REVIEW application. Decision values: APPROVED or REJECTED. Transitions the application to its final status and triggers downstream workflows (notifications, disbursement). Role: APPROVER.
Retrieve the approver dashboard with all decisions rendered by a specific approver, including approval rate and statistics.
Update an existing decision for an application. Role: APPROVER or ADMIN.
Delete a decision record for a specific application. Role: ADMIN.

item.name: 06 - Disbursements
item.description: Disbursement scheduling for approved applications. Role: FINANCE_OFFICER or ADMIN.

request.description: Retrieve all scheduled disbursement installments for a specific approved application.
Retrieve the outstanding grant balance remaining for an application after accounting for paid installments.
Create a dynamic disbursement schedule for all APPROVED applications in a program. Frequency values: MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, BI_ANNUALLY, ANNUALLY. Role: FINANCE_OFFICER or ADMIN.

item.name: 07 - Payments
item.description: Payment processing and receipt management. Role: FINANCE_OFFICER or ADMIN. Payment IDs are encrypted to prevent enumeration.

request.description: Execute a payment for a scheduled disbursement installment. Method values: BANK_TRANSFER, UPI, CHECK, NEFT. The response includes an `encryptedId` — save it to `{{encrypted_payment_id}}`. Role: FINANCE_OFFICER.
Retrieve payment details using its encrypted ID (returned by the Process Payment endpoint). Encrypted IDs prevent sequential ID enumeration.
Retrieve all payment records associated with a specific application.
Download a PDF payment receipt for a specific payment. Response Content-Type: application/pdf. In Postman, use 'Send and Download' to save the PDF file.

item.name: 08 - Grant Reports
item.description: Post-disbursement progress reporting by grant recipients. Role: APPLICANT.

formdata.description: JSON metadata part (application/json). Contains applicationId, scope, and metrics.
Supporting evidence file (PDF, JPG, PNG). Select the proof document from your file system.

request.description: Submit a post-disbursement progress report as a multipart/form-data request. The `data` part is a JSON object (set Content-Type to application/json for that part). The `proof` part is a file attachment (PDF/image). Scope: 10–2000 characters. Role: APPLICANT.
Retrieve all grant progress reports submitted for a specific application.

item.name: 09 - Compliance
item.description: Compliance officer audit workflow for verifying grant report submissions. Role: COMPLIANCE_OFFICER or ADMIN.

body.raw:
{
  "grantReportId": "{{report_id}}",
  "complianceOfficerId": "{{compliance_officer_id}}",
  "status": "COMPLIANCE",
  "comments": "All financial records verified. Expenditure aligns with approved grant budget. Milestone completion evidence is satisfactory.",
  "type": "FINANCIAL_VERIFICATION"
}

request.description: Record an audit verdict on a submitted grant report. Status values: COMPLIANCE or NON_COMPLIANT. Type example: FINANCIAL_VERIFICATION. Role: COMPLIANCE_OFFICER.
Retrieve a compliance dashboard showing the audit status of all applicants within a specific program.

query.description: UUID of the compliance officer whose audit history to retrieve

request.description: Retrieve the complete audit history for a specific compliance officer.
Retrieve a list of approved applicants who have not yet submitted a grant progress report for a specific program.
Retrieve full details of a specific grant report, including proof document reference and scope/metrics content.
Check whether a grant report has been submitted for a specific application. Returns a boolean indicating submission status.

item.name: 10 - Analytics
item.description: Stateless reporting and analytics aggregations. Role: ADMIN only (enforced at API Gateway).

request.description: Retrieve the count of applications grouped by status (SUBMITTED, UNDER_REVIEW, APPROVED, REJECTED) for a given program. Role: ADMIN.
Retrieve day-by-day application submission trend data for a program. Useful for volume and velocity reporting. Role: ADMIN.
Retrieve financial aggregates for a program: total budget, amount disbursed, amount pending, and remaining balance. Role: ADMIN.

item.name: 11 - Notifications
item.description: User notification management. Internal service-triggered notifications (POST /send) are excluded from client use.

request.description: Create a templated notification for a user. The `category` field selects a notification template (e.g., SUBMISSION, APPROVAL, REJECTION, DISBURSED, WELCOME). If `message` is provided, it overrides the template. Role: ADMIN or internal services.
Send a one-off, non-templated plain-text notification to a user. Message content is used verbatim. Suitable for administrative announcements. Role: ADMIN.
Retrieve all notifications for a specific user, ordered by creation time descending.
Mark a specific notification as read. Updates the notification's read status. Role: owner user or ADMIN.
Replace a notification record with updated content. Role: ADMIN.
Permanently delete a notification by ID. Role: ADMIN.
